line: Squee gots ta tell you 'bout Gerrard. He wuz always gettin' inta trouble and Squee wuz always gettin' him out.
One time Gerrard fell inta dis big trap on Rath and Squee pulled him out all by hisself. Gerrard never even said thanks proper.
Gerrard wuz de boss but between you and Squee, Squee wuz de one doin' de real work.
Dat time on Mercadia when everybody got locked up? Squee broke 'em all out. Gerrard couldn't even pick a lock without Squee's help.
Gerrard always got de big speeches and de glory. Squee just got de job done, quiet-like. Well, mostly quiet.
You wanna know who saved Gerrard's butt more times den he can count? Squee. Dat's who.
Gerrard wuz real good at fightin' and lookin' important. Squee wuz real good at everything else.
Dere wuz dis one time Gerrard wuz gonna get killed by dis big Phyrexian and Squee shot it right in de butt from across de whole ship. Gerrard probly din't even notice.
Gerrard always said 'good work Squee' like it wuz nuthin'. After de ten-hundredth time Squee save him you'd think he'd be more impressed.
Squee liked Gerrard okay. He wuz stubborn and mean sometimes but he also let Squee stay on de ship when everybody else wuz tryin' ta throw him off.
You know dat time Gerrard got captured by Volrath? Squee came up with de whole rescue plan. De others just took credit.
Gerrard wuz always fussin' about his destiny and his Legacy and all dat. Squee's destiny wuz ta keep Gerrard from gettin' killed, which wuz a full-time job.
One time Squee told Gerrard ta get back on de book and close de portal and it worked! Saved de whole ship. Gerrard acts like he thought of it hisself.
Gerrard could fight real good but he din't know nuthin' about sneakin' or creepin' or stayin' hid. Good thing he had Squee.
Squee remembers de day dey made peace after de big fight on Mercadia. Gerrard knocked Squee off his chair but Squee wuz de bigger person about it.
Gerrard din't always appreciate Squee but deep down he knew. Deep down he knew Squee wuz de most important one on dat whole ship.
Dat time Gerrard wuz gonna throw hisself at Yawgmoth? Squee figured it out early. Squee ain't as dumb as everybody thinks.
Gerrard used ta pat Squee on de head like Squee wuz a pet or sumpthing. Squee din't always like dat but he ain't gonna lie, it wuz nice sometimes.
When Gerrard wuz sad about Hanna, Squee tried ta cheer him up. Nobody else even tried. Just Squee.
Squee told Gerrard where de Weatherlight wuz hidden in Mercadia. Squee found it while chasin' a bug. But Squee still found it!
Gerrard wuz a hero dey say. Squee say yeah, a hero who needed savin' ten hundred times by a goblin cabin boy.
De whole Weatherlight crew woulda been dead a dozen times over if Squee din't keep fixin' things. Gerrard's de one dey write songs about though. Don't seem right.
Gerrard once said Squee wuz de bravest coward he ever knowed. Squee thinks dat wuz a compliment.
Dat time Squee headbutted Ertai ta let Gerrard get away — dat wuz pure Squee. No plan, just head. Worked though!
Gerrard got all de fancy armor and de fancy sword. Squee got a cannon and it wuz enough, trust Squee.
Squee made it off de Weatherlight when it crashed inta de ocean. Just bobbed right up. Gerrard wuz surprised. Squee wuz not.
Gerrard said 'Squee, go do de dangerous thing' so many times dat Squee stopped countin'. But Squee always came back. Dat's de difference.
Squee gave Gerrard a hug at de end. Well Squee grabbed his leg but it's de same thing.
Gerrard's gone now. Been gone a long time. Squee misses him, not dat he'd say dat out loud. Too much. Squee said it too much.
Sometimes Squee wonders what Gerrard woulda said if he could see Squee now, bein' a Dubious Monarch and all. Probly sumpthing mean but nice at de same time.
Dere ain't nobody like Karn. He's all silver and big and he gives de best hugs even though it's like bein' hugged by a warm wall.
Karn wuz Squee's best friend on de whole ship. Maybe best friend Squee ever had. Don't tell nobody Squee said dat.
Squee used ta carry around dis warm silver ball dat turned out ta be part of Karn. Squee din't know! But Squee kept it safe. Dat counts.
Karn never made Squee feel dumb. Everybody else on dat ship made Squee feel dumb. Karn just listened.
One time Squee told Karn ta dance with a big soldier while Squee went ta get drinks. Karn din't even complain. Best friend material right dere.
Karn is a pacifist which means he din't like ta fight. Squee respected dat even while Karn wuz carrying Squee on his shoulders inta battle.
Squee love Karn! Squee screamed dat when Karn busted us outta dat prison. Squee ain't ashamed. It wuz true.
Karn wuz made of silver but he had more heart den most flesh-and-blood folks Squee ever met. And Squee met a lot of folks.
Squee rode on Karn's shoulders when de Phyrexians wuz attackin'. Best view in de whole battle. Also safest place.
Karn always looked out for Squee when de others din't bother. He wuz gentle like dat, even though he could crush a building if he wanted.
Dere wuz dis time Squee wuz scared outta his mind and Karn just put one big silver hand on Squee's head and somehow dat helped.
Karn went on ta become a Planeswalker eventually. Squee thinks dat wuz probly Squee's good influence rubbin' off.
People asked Karn dumb questions about being made of metal and he answered every one patient-like. Squee wuz less patient about dumb questions but Squee learned from Karn.
Karn wuz de only one who never once tried ta use Squee as bait. Dat says a lot about a person.
Squee told Karn once dat Squee wuz scared all de time. Karn said dat's what brave really means. Squee thinks Karn made dat up but it wuz nice ta hear.
One time de whole crew wuz arguin' and Squee and Karn just went off ta find sumpthing ta eat together. Dat's friendship.
Karn's not from Dominaria originally. He's from way back, from before. He told Squee about it once and Squee fell asleep but woke up at de good parts.
Squee's toy wuz actually part of Karn's essence or sumpthing magical. Squee kept it real warm in his pocket de whole time. You're welcome, Karn.
If Squee's bein' honest, and Squee is always honest, Karn wuz de best of all of dem. Don't tell Gerrard.
Karn built tings and thought about tings and wuz sad about tings real deep-like. Squee din't always understand but Squee wuz always dere.
Hanna wuz de navigator and also de prettiest person on de ship. Squee had very good taste, everybody agreed.
Hanna din't always take Squee serious but she wuz always nice about it. Dat's important. Squee appreciated nice.
One time Squee helped Hanna rewire a lift by distractin' de guards. Squee did all de hard work. Hanna just fiddled with wires.
Hanna had de prettiest hair and Squee mentioned it once and Gerrard got all weird about it. Very sensitive topic apparently.
Squee told Gerrard dat Hanna put grease in her hair and Gerrard got real quiet. Squee wuz just bein' helpful.
When Hanna died it wuz real bad. Squee din't have words for it. Still don't, really. Squee just gets quiet when dat comes up.
Hanna wuz smart, maybe de smartest on de ship. She could fix tings and fly tings and figure tings out. Squee could do dose tings too but different.
Tahngarth wuz de big hornhead minotaur who acted tough all de time. Squee always called him Tangy and he hated it. So Squee kept doin' it.
Squee and Tahngarth wuz gonna start a juggling act called Squee and Tangy's Jugglin' Jackanapes. It wuz gonna be a big hit. Tahngarth had some objections.
Tahngarth wuz always sayin' tings like 'put dat back, Squee' and 'stop eatin' dat, Squee' and 'dat's not food, Squee.' Very bossy for a hornhead.
Tahngarth's horn broke off once and Squee used de tip as a lockpick ta bust everybody outta jail. Squee is very resourceful.
Sisay wuz de captain before Gerrard took over. She wuz tough and smart and she din't take nonsense from nobody, including Squee, which wuz hard but fair.
Squee bought wine for guards to distract dem while sneakin' Sisay outta prison. Squee's plan, Squee's execution. Sisay just had ta walk out.
Sisay wuz real impressed when she found out Squee wuz good with a cannon. She said so. One time. Squee still thinks about it.
Orim wuz de healer and she kept everybody alive. She also kept Squee alive after Squee did dumb tings. Which wuz often.
Orim once said de crew would never eat Squee's cookin' again after some incident Squee don't fully remember. Squee tinks dat wuz an overreaction.
Orim gave Squee a spine once. Squee means she fixed Squee's spine, not dat she gave Squee one, though Squee already had plenty of spine thank you very much.
Ertai wuz a wizard who thought he wuz de smartest person alive. He wuz real smart. He wuz also a complete jerk about it. Dose two tings can both be true.
Ertai used ta quiz Squee about magic books and den laugh when Squee din't know. Squee had de last laugh eventually. Real last laugh.
Mirri wuz a nice cat lady who wuz real mean about Squee bein' loud. She said one time she'd show Squee a kidney and a spleeny if Squee din't pipe down. Rude.
De whole Weatherlight crew wuz like a family. A family dat yelled at Squee a lot. But still.
Starke wuz on de crew for a bit. He wuz sneaky and untrustworthy. Squee din't like him from day one. Squee has good instincts.
De whole crew had different jobs but Squee's job wuz basically saving everybody's butts and cooking and doin' de dangerous stuff nobody else wanted ta do.
Squee wuz technically de cabin boy but dat's just a title. In practice Squee wuz de most important person on dat ship.
Rath wuz a terrible place. Everything wuz wrong dere — de sky, de ground, de air. Even de bugs tasted wrong.
Volrath's Stronghold wuz de scariest place Squee ever went and Squee went a lot of scary places. It wuz all dark and twisty and smelled like metal and bad magic.
Squee done for Volrath. Squee bring dis up a lot. Because otherwise people forget and Squee don't want people ta forget.
Volrath wuz a shapeshifter which is extra scary because you don't know if you're talkin' ta Volrath or somebody Volrath is pretendin' ta be. Squee solved dis by bein' scared of everybody.
De mogg goblins on Rath wuz Squee's cousins sort of. Dey din't know dey wuz slaves. Dat made Squee sad even though Squee din't always show it.
De Predator wuz Volrath's ship and it wuz big and mean and it attacked de Weatherlight. Squee helped fight it off mostly by not dying.
Squee hid in a spot on Rath for a very long time. It wuz real boring. After a while boring is almost as bad as scary.
De flowstone in Rath could be shaped into anything. Squee mostly saw it shaped into walls and floors and scary trap rooms. Not one nice flowstone pillow anywhere.
Volrath had dis big throne room in de Stronghold. Very dramatic. Lots of spiky bits. Squee wuz not impressed but Squee wuz also very scared.
De Skyshroud forest wuz on Rath too. Dere wuz elves dere who din't like goblins. Squee din't like dem back. Even.
On Rath dere wuz dis Evincar business which means like a ruler. Volrath wuz de Evincar. Den Crovax wuz de Evincar. Dey kept switching and it wuz a whole thing.
Squee fetched rope in de Stronghold when everybody else wuz too scared. Well, Squee wuz also scared. But Squee fetched de rope anyway.
Sisay got captured by Volrath and dat's why dey went ta Rath in de first place. Squee came along because where else wuz Squee gonna go.
De mogg goblins in Rath lived in camps and served Volrath. Squee din't have de heart ta tell dem dey wuz bein' used. Squee also din't have de words ta explain it inna way dey'd believe.
Rath wuz like Dominaria but wrong. Like if somebody tried ta copy Dominaria but got most of it right except all de important parts.
Squee got very good at findin' hidin' spots in de Stronghold. Dere wuz lots of hidin' spots. Squee found dem all.
Volrath's whole plan wuz ta get Gerrard dere and mess with de Legacy. Squee din't understand de details but Squee understood dat it wuz bad and dat Squee needed ta do sumpthing.
De worst part of Rath wuz dat everything wuz de color of bruises and blood. Not a nice green bug or yellow slug in sight. Very depressing.
After Rath, Squee understood what real scary looked like. And den Mercadia happened and Squee found out Squee din't know nuthin' yet.
Mercadia wuz de place where goblins were kings! Well, where goblins ran tings. Squee fit right in, obviously.
On Mercadia de Kyren goblins wuz secretly in charge of everything. Dey acted like servants but dey wuz de real power. Squee understood dis immediately because Squee is smart like dat.
Squee got treated like royalty on Mercadia. Fine clothes, people bowin', orders being followed. It wuz de best three days of Squee's life.
De Kyren goblins dressed Squee up real nice on Mercadia. Squee had a good hat. De hat wuz important.
On Mercadia dey called Squee a soldier-cousin or sumpthing like dat. Squee took dis very serious and gave lots of orders to everyone.
Mercadia is inna mountain which is weird. Most places are on top of de ground. Squee found dis disorienting but also neat.
Squee visited Gerrard in his prison cell in Mercadia wearing fancy Kyren clothes. Gerrard wuz not happy ta see Squee like dat. Very ungrateful.
Squee had ta give up a fancy ring ta keep Gerrard happy on Mercadia. Squee picked a glass one from a broken bottle instead. It wuz a better ring anyway.
De jailbreak on Mercadia wuz mostly Squee's plan. Squee distracted de guards, Squee bought de wine, Squee navigated de streets. De others helped too but mostly Squee.
Squee navigated de streets of Mercadia and knew exactly where ta go. Squee had learned dat whole city. It's called being observant.
Mercadia had a big city market with all kinds of food. None of it had proper bugs or slugs but Squee made do.
De Phyrexian ship wuz hidden under Mercadia dis whole time. Squee found it. By accident while chasin' a fly. But Squee found it.
Mercadia had caterran enforcers who wuz supposed ta be scary. De big one knelt down and begged Squee's forgiveness. Squee let him sweat a bit before acceptin'.
Squee rode a jhovall in Mercadia and shouted drill commands. None of de commands made sense but everybody did dem anyway. Dat's leadership.
On Mercadia dey had a whole thing about de Weatherlight bein' dere and dey wanted it. Squee din't give it ta dem because it wuz Squee's ship. Well, de crew's ship. But Squee's point stands.
Squee found de Weatherlight inna secret hangar under Mercadia. He noticed it 'cause he wuz chasin' a big juicy fly and ran right inta de door. Still counts as findin' it.
Mercadia had dis huge city floating inna mountain. De bottom of Mercadia wuz where real poor people lived. De top wuz for rich folks. Very tall place, very long fall.
If Squee wuz bein' honest, Squee could've stayed on Mercadia and been treated real good. But Squee chose ta help de crew instead. Dat's called sacrifice.
De Phyrexian Invasion wuz de biggest war Squee ever saw and Squee saw some big wars. Metal monsters everywhere, ships blowin' up, everybody screamin'.
Yawgmoth's armies came pouring outta portals all over Dominaria. Squee wuz at his cannon de whole time. Squee shot a lot of things.
Squee manned de aft gun when de Phyrexians came. Everybody else wuz runnin' around panicking. Squee wuz already at de gun. Because Squee is always prepared.
De Phyrexians wuz metal on de outside and somethin' wrong on de inside. Like somethin' alive got turned inta a machine against its will. Real disturbing when you think about it.
Squee shot down a Phyrexian cruiser once. A whole cruiser! By hisself! Nobody wrote a song about dat but dey should have.
De invasion wuz everywhere all at once. Squee din't have time ta be scared. Well, Squee wuz scared, but Squee din't have time ta just be scared, Squee had ta also be shootin'.
Yawgmoth made dis big cloud of death dat killed everything it touched. Squee saw it eat a mogg goblin whole and it wuz de worst thing Squee ever saw.
During de invasion Squee got captured a couple times. Escaped every time. Squee's hard ta keep locked up. Very wriggly.
De Phyrexians din't understand why Squee kept comin' back after he died. Squee din't fully understand it either but he wuz grateful.
Squee reported ta de aft gun station through de speaking tube durin' de invasion. Said 'Squee too' every time. De others appreciated knowin' Squee wuz still alive. Probly.
De whole Invasion would've gone much worse without Squee's cannon work. Squee's not sayin' it would've been lost. Squee's just sayin' it definitely could've been lost.
Squee fought Phyrexians on Dominaria, in de sky, and in a prison. Three different fights in three different places. Squee got around a lot durin' de invasion.
Dere wuz Phyrexian sleeper agents already on Dominaria before de big invasion. Crovax and Ertai had both turned bad. Very hard ta trust anyone inna invasion situation.
De best part of de invasion, if any part wuz good, wuz shootin' things with de cannon and not havin' ta worry about accidentally hittin' de wrong side. Everything Phyrexian wuz de wrong side.
Squee volunteered ta go inta de Dreaming Caves for Hanna. Dangerous as anything down dere. Squee went. Because dat's what Squee does.
De Stronghold on Rath wuz where Squee first died. First time is always de worst. After dat Squee got used ta it somewhat.
Crovax wuz a vampire and he used ta be on de crew before he went real bad. He had a sad story but den he got mean and Squee stopped feeling sorry for him.
Hiya Crovax, nice teeth. Dat's what Squee said ta him right ta his face. Crovax wuz a big scary monster Evincar and Squee said it anyway. Squee has nerve.
Ertai stayed behind in de Stronghold when de crew left Rath. Dat wuz a mistake. Ertai got corrupted and turned Phyrexian and mean. Meaner than before even.
When Ertai turned bad he started usin' Squee for experiments. Killed Squee over and over. Very bad thing ta do ta a person. Even a goblin.
Yawgmoth made Squee immortal. Not on purpose ta do Squee a favor. He wuz testin' sumpthing. But de result wuz Squee can't die permanently. Ta everyone's surprise.
It don't hurt ta die, exactly. It's more like bein' real cold and den suddenly warm again. Squee's been through it enough ta know.
De first time Squee died he woke up surrounded by maggots and asked Gerrard what happened. Gerrard looked like he'd seen a ghost. In a way he had.
Ertai killed Squee so many times ta test de immortality. Squee kept comin' back. Eventually dat stopped bein' interesting ta Ertai and became annoying ta him. Good.
De afterlife has bugs. Real good bugs. Big juicy ones. Squee has been dere enough ta know. Yawgmoth din't realize he wuz doin' Squee any favors keepin' him alive.
Yes dere's a afterlife. It's a big bug fest. Squee said dat ta Urza once and Urza looked very confused. Urza wuz a smart man who din't know what ta do with dat answer.
Squee died from poison gas once and woke up fine. Died from swords, woke up fine. Died from a fall, woke up fine. At some point it stops bein' scary and starts bein' just inconvenient.
Squee got beheaded in front of a whole hall of soldiers ta prove he wuz immortal. It worked. Squee woke up with his head right back on and everything. Very dramatic moment.
Squee got Yawgmoth's mark put on him during de experiments. It hurt but den it turned out ta be de best accidental gift anyone ever gave Squee.
Ertai went full Phyrexian bad eventually. He wuz always unpleasant but den he got truly evil. Dose are different things.
Squee killed Ertai. Right there in Yawgmoth's domain. Yanked his hair first and gave Gerrard time ta get away, and den went back and finished de job. Squee is very thorough.
When Squee killed Ertai he said 'serves you right' over de ashes. It's not a fancy speech but it wuz sincere.
Squee found Ertai again during de Apocalypse when dey were in de Stronghold. Squee wuz already looking for a chance ta settle things.
Ertai killed Squee so many times Squee lost count. Den Squee killed Ertai once and dat wuz enough. Permanent. Very satisfying.
De Apocalypse wuz de final battle with Yawgmoth. Gerrard and de Legacy and de whole big magic destiny thing all came ta a head. Squee wuz right in de middle of it.
Squee told Gerrard ta use de Legacy against Yawgmoth. Well, Squee yelled at Gerrard ta get on de book and shut de portal. Same thing really.
During de Apocalypse Squee yelled ta everybody ta run and nobody listened until Squee already figured out what ta do. Story of Squee's life.
Squee survived de final crash into de ocean after de Apocalypse. Just bobbed up in de water. Yawgmoth say so, Squee said. Meaning Yawgmoth's gift meant Squee always makes it.
Gerrard died in de Apocalypse. De real final death. Squee don't like talkin' about dat part much.
After de Apocalypse Squee said Yawgmoth should've fixed hisself as good as he fixed Squee. Squee thought dat wuz funny. Urza's head did not laugh but it wuz still funny.
Crovax wuz already dead when Squee got dere — Gerrard had dealt with him. Squee had Ertai. Everything worked out fair in de end.
Squee stood in front of a whole army of Stronghold soldiers and did de beheading trick ta prove he wuz a magic man. Squee's plan. Entirely Squee's idea.
Squee looked at Urza's severed head and said dat magic man don't got his body back but Squee do. Squee guess Yawgmoth don't want him dead. Dat wuz a solid point.
After de war Tahngarth went off ta sail de seas as a free warrior. Squee proposed de juggling act one more time. Tahngarth declined again. His loss.
After de Weatherlight crew split up, Squee wuz alone for de first time in a long time. He didn't like it but he learned ta deal.
Centuries passed and Squee kept livin'. He saw Dominaria change real slow, like watching a very big and very lazy bug move across a very big leaf.
Squee wuz around for a lot of history. De Phyrexian defeat, de rebuilding, de whole new era of things. Squee saw all of it from de ground level, which is where Squee lives.
People come and go but Squee just keeps goin'. It sounds nice. It's mostly just lonely with occasional exciting bits.
Squee went back ta Dominaria and wandered around for a while. Ran inta some goblins. Dey made him a king or sumpthing. Squee din't seek it out, it just happened.
Dubious Monarch is Squee's official title now. It means king but with a question mark. Squee is fine with dis. Squee's existence has always had a question mark.
Squee found a goblin settlement and dey had some trouble and Squee solved it and somehow dat ended with Squee bein' in charge. Squee din't plan dis.
Bein' king is mostly about listenin' ta goblin problems all day. Squee's better at dis den you'd expect. Squee understands goblin problems from de inside.
Squee has outlived enemies, friends, whole civilizations. Dere's sumpthing ta be said for just bein' too stubborn ta stop existing.
New Phyrexians showed up eventually. Different ones but same idea — metal and poison and bad vibes. Squee had opinions about dis. Squee always has opinions.
Squee met new adventurers over de centuries. Some of 'em remind him of Gerrard or Karn a little. Squee don't say dis ta dem because it wuz make him get all quiet.
After centuries Squee still thinks about de Weatherlight. About de smell of it and de sound of de engines and de way Karn's shoulder wuz de best seat on board.
Squee's been on enough adventures since de war ta fill a whole library. Unfortunately Squee don't write so good so nobody wrote dem down. Squee's workin' on it.
Squee once ate sumpthing on Mercadia dat made him sick for three days. He still doesn't know what it wuz. He'd probably eat it again.
De secret ta living forever is not bein' bothered much by dying. Squee got real good at not bein' bothered by it.
Squee's been ta Phyrexia and back. Well, not voluntarily. And not all de way ta Phyrexia. But close. Close counts.
Some folks say goblins ain't good for much. Squee has been provin' dem wrong for centuries and is not tired of it yet.
Goblins are de most underestimated people on Dominaria. Everybody thinks we're just dumb and scared. We're more dan dat. We're also hungry.
Rundvelt wuz where Squee grew up. Lots of warrens and goblins and dark tunnels. Good place ta learn how ta hide and also ta appreciate sunlight when you finally see it.
Goblins got good instincts about danger. Most folks call dis being cowardly. Squee calls dis bein' right about how dangerous things are.
De Rundvelt warrens had de best grubs in all of Dominaria. Plump and wiggly and de right amount of crunch. Squee's been tryin' ta find somethin' dat good ever since he left.
Goblins don't usually get ta be adventurers. Dey get ta be obstacles in other people's adventures. Squee broke dat tradition and is real proud of it.
De Kyren of Mercadia were goblins who figured out how ta be in charge without anyone knowing. Squee finds dat approach very sophisticated.
In de warrens where Squee grew up, you learned fast dat making too much noise got you eaten. Squee learned ta be quiet when it mattered. He just chose not ta use dat skill often.
Most people think goblins are just good for chargin' inta danger without thinking. Squee agrees with dis description but points out dat sometimes dat's exactly what de situation needs.
Dominaria has had a lot of trouble over de years. Squee has watched most of it from various heights and angles. De view from de Weatherlight wuz de best.
Goblins in Dominaria have it rough. Always at de bottom of things. Squee improved his situation considerably through bravery, luck, and an inability ta die.
De Weatherlight wuz de best ship that ever flew. Squee will fight anybody who says different and Squee's had lots of practice fighting.
Glok wuz Squee's friend from before de Weatherlight days. He liked storms and bets and laughin'. He still owes Squee from a bet too. Rude of him ta die owin' Squee money.
Squee used ta cook for de whole Weatherlight crew. Orim said dey'd never eat his cooking again which Squee thinks wuz rude but also mostly accurate after dat one incident.
Squee's got a whole goblin settlement now. With a throne and rules and goblins who listen ta Squee. It took several centuries but things are going Squee's direction at last.
Goblins are real good at finding food where there ain't supposed ta be any. Squee is especially good at dis. It is a core survival skill.
Squee found bugs on every world he went ta, even de bad ones. Even Rath had bugs, although dey tasted like flowstone. Even Phyrexia had bugs, although Squee wuz not brave enough ta eat those.
Nobody writes history from de goblin cabin boy's point of view. Squee thinks dis is a real shame because dat point of view saved everybody's lives multiple times.
De Legacy wuz dis collection of artifacts dat Urza and dem put together over centuries. Very important, very powerful. Squee accidentally sat on part of it once. Nothing bad happened.

Urza wuz very old and very smart and also kind of scary ta be around. He had a whole plan for fighting Yawgmoth dat involved de Weatherlight crew. Squee wuz part of de plan whether he liked it or not. He did not like it.
Dominaria's had too many invasions for a nice place. Squee's seen most of de recent ones and can confirm dey all wuz bad.
People say Dominaria's better now. Squee says maybe, but give it time. Trouble has a way of finding good places.
Squee's been part of two different group-efforts ta save de whole world. Both times worked out. Squee likes ta think his contributions mattered. Squee is correct.
Gerrard got mean for a while on Mercadia and it hurt Squee's feelings. Den dey made up. Den Gerrard died. Life's like dat sometimes.
Karn said dat Yawgmoth's curse wuz actually a gift if you look at it right. Squee looks at it right. Squee's still here and Yawgmoth ain't.
Squee wuz at de aft gun for most of de big battles. De aft gun is de back of de ship which means Squee wuz always de last line of defense. Very heroic position.
Squee warned de crew about Phyrexians inna basement of Mercadia. Knocked out and left for dead but he warned dem first. Very important.
Squee has been king, cabin boy, gunner, cook, spy, lockpick, decoy, and hero. Not all at once. But over time.
De most important thing Squee ever did wuz just stay. Stay on de ship when things got bad. Stay with de crew when dey needed someone dere.
Squee's whole life has been scary. Most goblins woulda quit. Squee never found de right moment ta quit and eventually stopped looking for it.
Tahngarth said Squee wuz brave when he din't know what wuz good for him. Squee took dat as a compliment even though Tahngarth din't mean it as one.
De best view of any battle wuz from Karn's shoulders. Squee always tried ta get up dere during de really big fights. Safe and tall. Perfect.
Gerrard once said Squee wuz indispensable and Squee didn't know what dat meant but it sounded good. Squee still uses de word when describing hisself.
Hanna fixed tings and Orim healed tings and Tahngarth hit tings and Squee did all de other tings. De crew worked like dat.
Squee once told Tahngarth he should salute him. Dis wuz on Mercadia when Squee outranked everybody. Tahngarth did not salute. Very disappointing.
Sisay wuz a great captain. She got captured and de whole ship had ta go rescue her. Squee helped a lot with dat rescue. A LOT.
Ertai is gone. Squee made sure of dat. Sometimes Squee still wakes up and thinks about it and feels satisfied.
Squee ain't book-smart but Squee is alive-smart. Dere's a difference and Squee will take alive-smart every time.
After de Apocalypse Squee looked at de whole wreckage and thought: Squee made it again. Like always. Because Squee always makes it.
Squee has a theory dat de universe keeps him alive because somebody has ta remember all de stuff dat happened. Squee's de historian now whether he likes it or not. He mostly likes it.
De Weatherlight crew saved Dominaria. Squee wuz on de Weatherlight crew. Dose two facts are connected in an important way.
Squee's cooking wuz unfairly criticized. It wuz unusual, not bad. Dere's a difference. Bugs are nutritious!
Volrath looked like Gerrard for a while because he wuz a shapeshifter. Squee could always tell de difference though. Squee knew Gerrard's smell.
Rath had mogg goblins everywhere doing Volrath's dirty work. Squee felt bad for dem. Den Squee found out dey'd been made ta do it against their nature and felt worse.
Squee once navigated through all of Mercadia in de dark, finding every back alley and secret route. Squee's got a good nose for direction. Also just a good nose in general.
Karn didn't fight unless he had ta. Squee din't fight unless he had ta either. Dey were alike in dat way even though one of dem wuz silver and de other wuz green.
Gerrard din't always trust Squee with de important stuff but when he really needed somebody Squee wuz always de one who showed up. Dere's a lesson in dere somewhere.
After centuries, Squee has met plenty of new people who never heard of de Weatherlight. Squee tells dem all about it. At length. Dey get de full story.
Hanna wuz de one who said 'because it's not a toy' about de manakin she took from Squee. Squee still thinks dat manakin looked like a toy.
Squee don't need no fancy legacy weapons or destinies. Squee's got his immortality and his cannon and his memories. Dat's enough.
People ask Squee if he's happy. Squee says he's happy enough. He's alive which is more den most people from his era can say.
Squee has been de hero of dis story since before most folks wuz born. Dey just din't know ta write dat version down.
De thing about Rath wuz dat it wuz always dark and cold and wrong. Squee wuz scared de whole time. Squee is also very glad Squee went because de crew needed him.
Crovax used ta be a noble and almost normal before Phyrexia got him. Squee saw him change over time. It wuz like watching sumpthing go bad slow.
Squee saw de Weatherlight get fixed and broken and fixed again so many times he lost count. Same wuz true for most of de crew. Including Squee.
De Phyrexians had dis whole hierarchy — da Inner Circle, de Nine Spheres, all dat. Very organized for evil metal monsters. Squee din't care about de hierarchy. Squee just shot whatever moved wrong.
Yawgmoth died when de Legacy wuz used against him. Big explosion, big death. Squee wuz in de ocean afterward. Squee considered it a good ending.
Squee proposed naming Sisay's new ship 'De Squee.' Sisay declined. Squee thinks dis wuz a missed opportunity.
After de war Squee misquoted dat proverb about serving in heaven versus ruling in hell. He got dem backwards. Tahngarth corrected him. Squee said 'oh' and moved on.
It's nice ta be needed. Dat's really de whole thing about Squee's life summed up. Squee wuz always needed even when nobody admitted it.
You gotta be pretty smart ta live long as Squee. Not being able ta die helps too. But de smart part is also important. Just so everybody knows.
Squee's been doin' dis long enough dat he remembers things nobody else alive remembers. Dat makes him valuable. Also lonely. Mostly valuable though.
Gerrard wuz de hero but Squee wuz de one still here. De universe gots a sense of humor.
Squee never wanted ta be a symbol or a king or a legend. But Squee wanted ta be useful and ta be with friends. Two out of three ain't bad.
Karn went on ta have big adventures of his own after everything. Squee hopes Karn remembers Squee. Squee definitely remembers Karn.
Squee killed Ertai, survived Yawgmoth, outlasted de Phyrexians, and became a king. Not bad for a cabin boy from Rundvelt.
Squee was scared all de time on de Weatherlight. He wuz also on de Weatherlight all de time. Dose two facts together mean something important about Squee.
Squee misses de sound of de Weatherlight's engines more dan almost anything else. Dat wuz de sound of home.
Gerrard and Squee had dis whole thing in Mercadia where Gerrard wuz mean and Squee called him on it and dey made up. Squee ain't sorry he said something. It needed saying.
Squee's been inna lot of trouble over de centuries and got out of every last bit of it. Squee considers dis his main talent.
Goblins on Dominaria lived in de warrens and kept ta themselves mostly. Squee left and saw de whole world. Goblins should do dat more.
Squee has eaten bugs on Dominaria, Mercadia, Rath, and in at least two afterlives. He's what you'd call a connoisseur.
De Apocalypse wuz de end of de Weatherlight saga but not de end of Squee. Never de end of Squee.
Squee remembers every face on de Weatherlight. He closes his eyes sometimes and walks de whole ship again in his head. Every room. Every person.
After all dese years Squee still thinks de part where Squee done for Volrath don't get enough credit in de stories.
De cabin boy saved everybody and nobody wrote about it in de big history books. Squee is adding dis ta de record right now, ta whoever's listening.
Squee's head got cutted off one time and den it grew back. If dat ain't proof dat Squee is special, Squee don't know what is.
Squee told de whole army of soldiers dat he wuz a magic man and den proved it by survivin' a beheading. Dat wuz a good day's work.
Every time Squee came back from dyin' he woke up a little more sure of hisself. After a hundred times Squee wuz practically confident.
Squee's advice ta anyone facin' a very dangerous situation: if you can't die permanently, half de problem is already solved.
De first time Squee died from bein' stabbed he wuz real upset about it. Den he came back and wuz mostly just annoyed at de inconvenience.
Squee has died from poison, blades, bludgeoning, falling, drowning, an exploding ship, and probably a few tings he don't remember. All temporary.
De nice thing about immortality is dat Squee gots time ta figure stuff out. De not-nice thing is dat he keeps losin' de people he figures stuff out with.
Yawgmoth wuz tryin' ta make Squee into a test subject and instead made him into a legend. Not de outcome Yawgmoth wuz goin' for, Squee bets.
Squee came back from de dead so many times dat he worked out a whole routine. Wake up, check if body's all dere, find sumpthing ta eat, figure out what happened.
Ertai killed Squee ta test de immortality over and over. Squee came back every time. Eventually Squee got ta kill Ertai. Only once. But dat's all it takes when you ain't immortal.

Squee sometimes thinks about what would've happened if Ertai hadn't done dose experiments. Squee would've died at some point and dat would've been dat. Instead Squee's still here. Thanks Ertai. Sort of.
De afterlife smells like earth and old bugs. Very comfortable, actually. Squee don't rush ta get back but he always does come back.
Squee's been ta de afterlife enough times dat he knows which direction ta walk when he gets dere. It ain't complicated if ya been enough times.
After Squee died de first time he told Gerrard about de afterlife. Gerrard looked upset. Squee told him not ta worry cause the bugs were very good there. Gerrard got quieter.
It just don't stick. Dat's how Squee explains it. You can kill Squee but de death just don't stick. Like mud on a slick rock.
Squee once used his immortality ta win an argument. He said 'go ahead and try if you think you're right' and de other fella backed down.
Squee has watched empires fall from de outside, which is a better view than most get. Being immortal means never bein' too invested in any one empire.
De weirdest death Squee ever had wuz from sumpthing he ate in Mercadia. Squee still don't know what it wuz. Came back fine though. A little smarter about what he eats. A little.
Squee can look an immortal in de eye cause Squee is one too. Most immortals act all superior about it. Squee thinks dey're making a big deal outta nuthin'.
After enough centuries ya start ta see patterns. Trouble comes, brave people fight it, Squee helps, trouble goes away for a while. Den trouble comes back.
Gerrard once sat Squee down and told him dat Squee wuz important ta de crew. Not de Legacy important or destiny important, just people important. Squee thought about dat for a long time.
De day Gerrard knocked Squee off dat chair in Mercadia, Squee wuz real hurt. But Squee understood later dat Gerrard wuz hurtin' too. Dey were alike in dat way.
Gerrard wuz always de chosen one, de hero of de prophecy. Squee wuz de goblin who happened ta be standing next ta de chosen one. Squee prefers it dat way. Less pressure.
Squee told Gerrard ta get on de book and Gerrard did and de portal shut and it worked. Squee gave de order. Squee made de call.
Gerrard had a destiny dat dragged him along whether he wanted it or not. Squee just chose ta keep following. Maybe dat's harder, actually.
Squee made Gerrard a nice meal once. Gerrard ate it without complaining. Dat wuz real friendship right dere.
Gerrard wuz always so serious about everything. Squee tried ta lighten tings up. Gerrard din't always appreciate it but de others did sometimes.
Squee don't think Gerrard ever knew how much Squee admired him. Squee wouldn't say it out loud. Too embarrassing. But Squee admired him.
Gerrard's death at de end wuz de kind of end dat a chosen-one hero gets. Real dramatic. Squee's death, when it eventually comes for real, will probly be less dramatic. Maybe involving a bug.
De whole time on de Weatherlight Squee called Gerrard 'boss.' It wuz a little sarcastic but also real. Dat's how things wuz between dem.
Karn's real quiet but when he talks everybody listens. Squee listened ta Karn more dan he listened ta anybody else. Including orders he din't like.
Squee taught Karn some goblin words. Not good goblin words, de fun ones. Karn din't use dem much but he remembered dem. Squee checked.
Karn wuz sad a lot, deep down. A long time sad. Squee could tell. Sometimes Squee would just sit near him and dat seemed ta help a little.
Squee and Karn once spent a whole afternoon not talkin', just sittin' on de hull of de ship watching clouds. Squee counts dat as one of his best memories.
Karn thought everything through very careful. Squee mostly just reacted. Dey balanced each other out, like a seesaw between a golem and a goblin.
One time Karn picked Squee up ta save him from a danger and held Squee in one big silver palm. Very safe. Very warm. Best feeling.
Karn told Squee once dat being alive wuz a gift. Squee thought dat wuz rich coming from a golem who couldn't die normally, but Squee also thought he wuz right.
When Karn became a Planeswalker Squee wuz real proud. Like watching a friend grow up, except de friend is a giant silver golem who steps between worlds.
Squee has had a lot of good friends over de centuries. None of dem like Karn.
Karn din't eat bugs. Karn din't eat anything. Squee tried ta explain what he wuz missing but Karn wuz very polite about not havin' a mouth for it.
Squee used ta sleep in de engine room near de warmest part of de ship. One time he realized dat warm spot wuz near where Karn rested. Squee din't move.
Karn was older dan almost anything on Dominaria when Squee knew him. But he never once made Squee feel young and dumb. Just Squee.
When Squee shouts 'Squee love Karn' he ain't embarrassed about it. It wuz true when he said it and it's true now.
Karn protected Squee more times than Squee can name. And every time he did it like it wuz de most natural thing, not like he wuz doing Squee a favor.
Squee once asked Karn if golems dream. Karn said he thought about tings during standby that might count as dreams. Squee said that sounded nice. Karn agreed.
De crew wuz a family whether dey liked it or not. Squee definitely liked it. De others came around eventually.
Mirri and Squee din't always get along but dey wuz on de same side and dat matters when de shooting starts.
Hanna kept de ship in de right direction. Without her dey woulda flown inta a mountain or off de edge of Rath or sumpthing. Very important job.
Squee cried when Hanna died. He din't let nobody see it but he cried.
Hanna wuz always real kind ta Squee even when everybody else wuz exasperated. She said please and thank you ta him. Small thing but Squee remembered it.
Orim healed Squee more times den anyone else. She must've gotten real tired of it. She never complained. Well, once about de cooking. But never about de healing.
Tahngarth pretended not ta like Squee but at de end, when dey talked about de juggling act, dere wuz something in his eyes. Maybe respect. Probly just amusement.
Squee and Sisay had an understanding. She trusted Squee ta do what needed doing and Squee did it. Dat wuz better than most arrangements Squee ever had.
Ertai before de corruption wuz annoying. Ertai after wuz genuinely evil. Squee knew de difference and adjusted his feelings accordingly.
Starke betrayed everybody and came back and tried ta make things right. Squee never trusted him again. Squee has a good memory for betrayal.
De crew bickered all de time about everything. Where ta go, what ta do, who outranked who. None of it mattered when de shooting started. Den dey all worked together.
Everybody on de crew had a tragedy. Crovax had his curse. Ertai had his ambition. Hanna had her sickness. Squee had his cooking critiques.
Squee wuz de only crew member who never had a complicated reason for bein' dere. He wuz just dere because dey wuz his people.
On Rath dere wuz dis stuff called flowstone and it would shift around and change shape. Walking on it wuz like walkin' on something dat couldn't decide what it wuz.
Skyshroud wuz de forest dat de elves brought ta Rath from Dominaria. It wuz de only green thing on Rath and de elves wuz very protective of it.
Rath wuz a construct plane, made on purpose by Phyrexia as a staging ground. When Squee figured dat out it made him even more scared. Like finding out de scary house wuz built ta be scary.
Volrath could look like anybody. He looked like Gerrard at one point which wuz extremely confusing. Squee says ya can always tell de fake from de real one by how dey treat Squee.
De Stronghold wuz built in a volcano on Rath. Squee remembers de smell — like metal and fire and sumpthing worse den both.
De mogg goblins didn't know dey wuz slaves until Squee and de crew showed dem. Dere's sumpthing real sad about showing someone dey're inna cage.
Rath had dese things called Vec who wuz like slaves of Volrath too. Everybody on Rath wuz in trouble and most of dem didn't even know it.
De air on Rath wuz wrong. Not poisonous exactly but wrong. Like breathing air dat wuz made by something dat din't fully understand what air wuz for.
Squee hid inna barrel on Rath for a while. Real dark in dere. Real quiet. Squee ate de barrel's contents and felt better about de whole situation.
De Predator wuz Volrath's flagship and it wuz enormous. It kept attackin' de Weatherlight. Squee shot at it from de aft gun more times den he can count.
On Rath dere wuz a moment when Squee thought dey weren't gonna make it back. Squee didn't say dat out loud because he din't want ta be right about it.
When de Weatherlight finally got off Rath Squee sat at de back and watched it get small behind dem. He's not sorry ta have left it.
De Stronghold's prison wuz real dark and cold. Squee wuz dere twice more den he wanted ta be which is ta say Squee wuz dere at all.
Volrath wuz powerful and cruel and had a whole plane doing what he said. Squee still killed him. Size don't count for as much as you'd think.

In Mercadia everything wuz upside down — literally. De city wuz at de top of de mountain but de mountain wuz hollow and people lived inside. Squee spent two days being confused about which way wuz up.
De Kyren had a whole secret language dat dey used right in front of de other Mercadians. Very clever. Squee picked up some words.
Squee wuz treated as a honored cousin in Mercadia. It felt good even though Squee knew it wuz complicated. Squee took de good parts and ignored de complicated parts.

On Mercadia dey had dis great food market and Squee ate everything he could find. Most of it wuz fine. Some of it wuz not fine. Nobody died. Well, Squee died once but dat wuz from de dangerous thing, not de food.
Squee got dressed up in Kyren finery on Mercadia and looked, by any goblin standard, magnificent. Gerrard din't agree but Gerrard wuz in jail at de time and din't have de best perspective.
De Mercadians wuz very good at trade and very bad at fighting. Squee could relate ta de second part.
On Mercadia Squee had a cateran enforcer doing what he said. Squee gave orders all day long and all of dem got followed. Dat wuz how things oughta work.
Mercadia had a whole political setup dat wuz complicated. De Kyren were secretly in charge of de Mercadians who wuz officially in charge. Squee thinks dis wuz too many layers.
De jailbreak in Mercadia had so many moving parts — wine, guards, lockpicks, lifts, disguises. Squee orchestrated de whole thing mostly by being very convincing at not knowing what he wuz doing.
When Squee said 'Goblins! What about goblins?' after hearing de word, dat wuz genuine. Squee always perked up when his people were mentioned.
Mercadia is where Squee first got ta feel what it wuz like ta be respected. He wuz right ta enjoy it because it din't last long.
De Phyrexian ship under Mercadia wuz enormous. Squee found it while chasin' a fly into a wall that turned out ta be a door. Fate works strange sometimes.
De Invasion started and nobody wuz ready even though dey'd been getting ready for it forever. Dat's usually how big tings go.
Phyrexians hit Dominaria from multiple directions at once. De Weatherlight wuz one of de main defenders. Squee manned de aft gun and tried not ta think about how many dere wuz.
During de Invasion de skies over Dominaria were full of ships. Phyrexian ships, Dominarian ships, ships from other nations. Squee's job wuz ta shoot de metal ones.
De Phyrexians had different kinds of soldiers — some machine, some flesh, some both. De mixed ones were de worst ta look at.
Squee got shot down during de Invasion and survived de crash and got right back up ta a gun. Dat's bravery or stubbornness or both.
During de Invasion Squee surrendered when dey all got caught. Den Squee immediately started planning how ta not be surrendered anymore.
De prison on Dominaria during de Invasion wuz guarded and locked and Squee got everyone out anyway because Squee's been in enough prisons ta know how ta get out of 'em.
Squee used Tahngarth's broken horn tip ta pick de lock in dat prison. Best use of a minotaur horn ever. Tahngarth din't fully agree.
During de Invasion Squee shot down his first cruiser. A full warship. Squee. By hisself. With de aft cannon. Nobody wrote a song about dat but dey should've.
Yawgmoth's cloud wuz de most terrifying thing Squee saw during de Invasion. It wuz alive-ish and it wanted ta kill tings and it wuz everywhere.
De whole world fought de Invasion. Elves, humans, dwarves, goblins, cat warriors, merfolk, everybody. It wuz de one time Squee didn't feel outnumbered even though dey really were.
When de Invasion ended de whole world wuz quiet for a while. Like after a very loud noise and everything's still ringin'.
Squee don't like ta say dis but de Invasion wuz de best he ever shot a cannon. Nothin' sharpens your aim like actual Phyrexians coming at ya.
Dere wuz all kind of heroes in de Invasion. Big famous ones with swords and speeches. And den dere wuz Squee at de back of de ship keeping tings alive.
Crovax used ta be a good person. Squee knew him when he wuz almost decent. Den de curse got worse and worse until dere wuz nothing good left.
Crovax became Evincar after Volrath. Squee walked right up ta him and said 'hiya Crovax, nice teeth' because Squee felt like being brave dat day.
De Stronghold is where everything got its worst. Squee died dere de first time and it went downhill from dere for a while.
Squee went back ta de Stronghold during de Apocalypse. It wuz still terrible. Squee had unfinished business dere with Ertai though.
De Stronghold during de Apocalypse wuz full of soldiers who didn't know what ta think when Squee's head came back after bein' cut off. Squee gave dem a moment ta process it.
Squee found Ertai in de Stronghold and finally settled accounts. A lot happened between den and when Ertai left de crew. All of it led ta dat moment.
De last time Squee wuz in de Stronghold he walked out as a magic man who had proven his immortality ta an army. Much better exit than his first time dere.
Crovax killed Selenia in de Stronghold and dat's what finished breaking him. Squee acted out de story with his hands and a mouth full of maggots once and Gerrard looked horrified.
De mogg goblins in de Stronghold were sad. Even at de time Squee thought about dem. Dey wuz doing terrible tings because dey wuz made ta. Not de same as choosing it.
De Stronghold had all dese levels going down inta de volcano. Every level wuz worse dan de one above. Squee went far enough down ta know he din't want ta know what wuz at de bottom.
After de Apocalypse Squee wandered Dominaria for a while not knowing what ta do with hisself. Dat wuz de hardest time, harder even than de battles.
Squee attended de memorial for de Weatherlight crew. Well, Squee stood at de edge and din't say much. But Squee wuz dere.
After de war people kept asking Squee what it wuz like. Squee told dem. It wuz loud and scary and everybody worked real hard and some people didn't make it. Dey usually wanted more detail.
Squee's seen Dominaria rebuild after de Apocalypse. Very slow. Very expensive. But things grew back eventually. Like Squee's head.
De last thing Gerrard ever did wuz save Dominaria with de Legacy. He always wuz de hero type. Right up until de end.
Squee helped plan de final operation in de Stronghold even though nobody officially asked him ta help plan it. He helped anyway. Dat's how Squee operates.
After de Apocalypse Sisay got a new ship. She offered ta let Squee come along. Squee said maybe later. He needed some time. First time Squee ever turned down a ship.
De Apocalypse wuz de end and de beginning at de same time. End of de war, end of de crew, beginning of everything after.
Squee spent a long time after de war just walking around Dominaria seeing how it had changed. A lot had changed. Squee hadn't.
Squee found a nice cave at one point and stayed dere for a couple years. Very peaceful. Very boring. But Squee needed de boring after all dat exciting.
New goblins keep bein' born and dey never heard of de Weatherlight and dey look at Squee like he's just some old goblin. He tells dem dey're wrong about de old part.
Squee kept his glass ring from de Mercadia days for a long time. Simple thing. Green glass from a broken wine bottle. Worth more ta Squee than any Kyren jewel.
De Dubious Monarch title came from someone who wuz joking about whether Squee really wuz de rightful ruler. Squee took it as an official title. It stuck.
Being a monarch means dealing with problems. Squee deals with dem. Not always de right way. But Squee deals with dem.
Squee's goblin settlement has a council now. Dey argue a lot. Squee lets dem argue and den tells dem what's gonna happen anyway. Good system.
After centuries Squee thinks maybe de universe kept him around ta serve as a warning. 'See dat goblin? Even he can't die. Maybe try being immortal through stubbornness.'
Squee met a young adventurer once who reminded him of Gerrard so much it hurt. Squee helped dem out and din't say why. Good deed. Private.
Dominaria went through a second big Phyrexian problem much later. New generation of metal monsters, same basic idea. Squee wuz unimpressed. He'd seen it before. He helped anyway.
Being immortal means ya see de same fights happening ta different people over and over. Squee tries ta help de new people skip some of de lessons Squee's crew learned de hard way.
Squee's kingdom ain't big. It ain't fancy. But it's his and de goblins dere chose him which wuz nice given dat nobody chose Squee for much when he wuz young.
Squee never thought of hisself as a symbol of resistance against Phyrexia. He just kept not dying and showing up and fighting. But dat turned out ta mean de same thing.
Goblin goblins, dat's what Squee likes ta call de normal ones who never got off Dominaria and had adventures. Dey got a point actually. Adventures are mostly terrible.
De goblins in Squee's settlement call him Squee de Immortal. Squee wishes dey'd just call him Squee. But dere's no fighting a good title once it sticks.
Young goblins ask Squee how ta be brave. Squee says you just do de thing while being scared. Dey say dat doesn't help. Squee says it's all de help dere is.
Dominaria's goblins used ta live in warrens and keep away from big folk. Now some of dem got a king. Squee. It's an adjustment for everybody.
Goblin history on Dominaria is mostly about getting pushed around by larger people. Squee is working on changing dat one settlement at a time.
Goblins have a tradition of not doing suicidally dangerous things unless forced to. Squee broke dis tradition repeatedly and doesn't recommend it unless you're immortal.
De best part of being a goblin is dat nobody expects much, which means when you do something brave it surprises everybody including yourself.
Squee kept all his stories in his head because nobody wuz writing dem down. He tells dem ta anyone who'll listen. Dat's why you're hearing dis right now.
Goblin warrens have rules. Don't eat de sleeping ones. Don't fight near de food pile. Don't tell stories during de scary times because dey take too long.
Squee wuz always de smallest person in any big fight except when de fight wuz goblin versus goblin which wuz more even.
Goblins smell fear. Squee said dis ta Gerrard once and Gerrard got real uncomfortable and moved away. Squee wuz exaggerating. Mostly.
De goblin diet wuz mostly bugs and scraps and whatever nobody else wanted. Squee expanded his palate on de Weatherlight but still thinks a good fat beetle beats almost any fancy food.
In goblin culture de one who survives de most terrible things gets de most respect. By dis measure Squee should be respected absolutely everywhere. He is not. But he should be.
Squee's done things goblins weren't supposed ta do: flew on a ship, saw other planes, talked ta gods-basically, became immortal, became a king. None of it wuz planned.
De thing about goblin society is dat it's simple. You survive, you eat, you don't get stepped on. Squee added some complexity ta his life but those three tings are still de goal.
Squee misses Glok sometimes. Old friend from de warrens. Owed Squee money from a bet. Gone a very long time now. Squee hopes wherever he is de bugs are plentiful.
Squee never went back ta de Rundvelt warrens where he grew up. He's not sure dey're still dere. Parts of Dominaria changed a lot during de war.
De most famous goblin in Dominaria's history is probly Squee. Squee says dis with full humility. Mostly full humility. Like ninety percent humility.
Squee found Gerrard real indispensable and Gerrard found Squee at least somewhat useful and dat's more than most goblins ever get from humans.
People ask Squee what's de secret ta his survival. He says it's de immortality. Dey say no, before dat. He says he hid a lot. Very good answer.
Squee once tried ta start a goblin business on Dominaria. A traveling show. Tumblin', jugglin', general antics. He needed a partner. Tahngarth said no again. Project stalled.
Squee and Karn talked about de nature of creation once. Karn talked about Urza and artifice and purpose. Squee talked about how bugs were created ta be eaten and wuz dat a kindness.
Squee wuz good at his aft gun because he practiced. Not official practice, just hours and hours of pointin' de barrel at things and thinkin' about trajectory. Squee is self-taught.
After de invasion Squee said he never wanted ta fire a cannon again. Three weeks later he had a cannon again. Some habits are too deep ta break.
Ertai wuz de smartest jerk Squee ever met and Squee met a lot of jerks. He wuz good at magic, real good. Wasted it all on being terrible.
Ertai made Squee feel dumb on purpose, in front of everybody, over and over. Squee has a long memory. It wuz very satisfying later.
Squee head-butted Ertai ta save Gerrard and it worked and Squee got seriously hurt. Still one of de best tings Squee ever did.
Ertai left de crew on Rath and Squee had a bad feeling about it immediately. Not a fancy magical feeling, just a regular bad feeling. Squee wuz right.
Ertai at de end wuz barely recognizable from de wizard who wuz on de crew. Phyrexia takes people and puts something wrong in their place.
When Squee says he's de hero of Mercadia he means he did de most important heroic tings while dere. Dis is accurate even if de history books describe it differently.
Squee wuz de first one through de door most of de time on Mercadia. Not because he wanted ta be. Because he wuz being pushed.
Mercadia is de place where Squee first understood dat goblins could be more than what everybody expected. De Kyren showed him dat. Changed how he thought about hisself.
Squee didn't have a weapon for most of de Mercadia adventure. Had ta use his wits and his words and de occasional accidental good timing.
On Mercadia dey had dese lifts ta get up ta de city and Squee helped distract de operator while Hanna rewired it. Squee's distraction wuz very convincing.
Squee bought a whole cart of wine on Mercadia ta distract de guards. He din't know if the money would cover it. It did. Success.
During de Invasion dere wuz dis battle near Koilos where things went very bad. Squee ran toward it instead of away from it. He doesn't know why. He just did.
Squee wasn't doing nuthin' when de mechanical spiders found him in Mercadia. Absolutely nuthin'. He wants dat on de record.
After de spiders went away Squee told everybody he wuz still in one piece. He wuz real proud of dat. Small wins matter.
During de Apocalypse Squee stood in front of hostile soldiers and gave a whole speech about being a magic man. He made it up as he went. He's a natural public speaker.
Squee commanded a whole battle by shouting from Karn's shoulders. 'Dat's another two hundred butts you owe Squee' is a real thing Squee said after shooting down a cruiser.
Planeshift wuz when tings got messiest. Ertai had turned fully, Crovax wuz in charge on Rath, and de Invasion wuz everywhere. Squee wuz very busy.
After de final battle Squee floated in de ocean and thought about everything. Den he thought about whether dere were any ocean bugs worth eating. Den he swam ta shore.
Squee's most important moment wuz probly saving Gerrard by headbutting Ertai. Nobody put dat in de histories. Squee is putting it in de histories now.
Squee once accidentally locked hisself outside de Weatherlight while it wuz in mid-air. He climbed back in through a vent. Nobody noticed. Nobody ever noticed when Squee did de hard tings.
De Legacy wuz a collection of artifacts from Urza. It fit together like a puzzle and de Weatherlight wuz de most important piece. Squee wuz on de Weatherlight. Squee wuz part of de Legacy.
Squee once volunteered for a mission where nobody thought he'd come back. He came back. He always comes back. He finds it funny dat nobody ever learns from dis.
Squee thinks Gerrard wuz de best commander he ever served under. Squee also thinks Gerrard needed a lot of saving for de best commander around.
Karn made Squee feel like he mattered. Not by saying it, just by how Karn wuz with him. Quiet and attentive and like Squee's words were worth hearing. Squee misses dat.
Squee kept up with de aft gun during every battle dey had. People forget dat part. Dey talk about de heroes and de warriors. Squee kept de back of de ship safe.
Squee knows what Yawgmoth looked like close up. Not many people do. Squee. Squee does.
If Squee hadn't warned about the Phyrexians in Mercadia before getting knocked out, everything would've gone very different. Very worse different.
Squee's favorite place on de Weatherlight wuz de cook's alcove. Not fancy. Smelled like food and metal. Very cozy. Very Squee.
Squee kept a little collection of shiny tings he found during de adventures. Most of dem got lost eventually. De glass ring from Mercadia lasted longest.
Squee den't fully understand de Legacy or de prophecies or de destiny parts. But he understood dat his friends needed help and he provided it. De rest wuz details.
Squee shot Phyrexian soldiers from de back of de Weatherlight in battle after battle. He got real good. He could judge range and speed and aim all at once. Dat's skill.
Squee took a job as cabin boy not knowing where he'd end up. He ended up saving de world twice, becoming immortal, and becoming a king. Better dan he expected.
Ertai used ta tell Squee dat he din't matter. Den Squee saved everybody's butts enough times dat Ertai stopped saying it. Dat's better than an apology.
Squee misses de Weatherlight every day. Not de battles. Not de fear. Just de ship itself and de people on it going somewhere together.
Squee's last words before getting knocked out inna Mercadia basement were 'Phyrexians, here!' Real important last words. Saved de mission. Squee is good at impactful last words.
Squee always wuz one of de goblins. He never thought hisself better than other goblins. He thought hisself better than other people, but dat's different.
Goblins in Squee's settlement have a tradition now of telling stories about de Weatherlight crew around de fire. Squee started dis tradition. He is also de only one who wuz actually dere.
Squee once ate sumpthing on Rath dat wuz de wrong color and it gave him two days of very uncomfortable immortality. He don't recommend it.
Squee has seen de sunrise over Dominaria hundreds of times. More times than he can count. Every single one of dem wuz worth it.
De most scared Squee ever wuz, in all his centuries, wuz de first time on Rath when he din't know what any of it meant and nothing felt safe.
Squee has a throne now. It's a big chair with goblin decorations on it. It ain't comfortable. But it's his.
Every goblin in Squee's settlement knows de names: Gerrard, Karn, Hanna, Tahngarth, Sisay, Orim. Dey know dem because Squee tells de stories. History matters.
Squee says ta de young goblins: you're descended from de Mogg, same as Squee. And de Mogg survived Rath. Dat means you come from survivors. Act like it.
Karn went off ta his own adventures eventually. Squee knows dis because Squee's been alive ta watch. He hopes Karn's doing good out dere.
Squee's happier now as Dubious Monarch than he wuz scared when he wuz cabin boy. Not because de danger's less. Because Squee finally knows he can handle it.
De Phyrexian Invasion ended and Squee thought it wuz over for good. Den centuries later new Phyrexians. Squee adjusted his expectations about tings being 'over for good.'
Squee once tried ta explain de Weatherlight ta some folks who never heard of it. He started at de beginning and they were dere for two days. Squee has a lot ta say.
Squee made de crew dinner one time dat wuz better dan usual and nobody said anything about it. Den de next time it wuz bad again and everybody complained. Very unfair.
Squee's approach ta every problem: find de small part dat Squee can actually do and do dat very well. De big parts will sort demselves out.
When tings got real bad Squee din't run. Well, Squee ran. But Squee ran ta where de trouble wuz, not away from it. Important distinction.
Squee held de glass ring from Mercadia for years after de war ended. Den one day a young goblin in de settlement needed sumpthing ta keep dat wuz special and Squee gave it ta him. Felt right.
De Weatherlight is gone but de story ain't. Squee makes sure of dat. Every day, tell somebody sumpthing about what happened. Keep it alive.
Squee once saw de sun rise while sitting on top of de Weatherlight's hull with Karn next to him and thought: dis is de best thing. He wuz right.
Being a cabin boy means ya do everything nobody else wants ta do. Squee did it without complaining. Well, with complaining. But Squee did it.
Squee'd like ta say dat he chose ta be brave. But really bravery found Squee and Squee just didn't run fast enough. Dat's what courage is for most goblins.
Da best thing about Dominaria now is dat it's quieter than it used ta be. Squee appreciates quiet in a way he couldn't when he wuz young and de Phyrexians were everywhere.
Squee thinks Yawgmoth wuz de biggest mistake in de history of Dominaria. Bigger than de Brothers' War. Bigger than anything. Good thing Squee wuz around when it mattered.
Squee never thought of hisself as a legend when he wuz on de Weatherlight. He wuz just scared and doing what needed doing. Dat's de making of most legends, apparently.
Hanna's navigator maps are probly lost now. Squee wishes he'd kept one. Sumpthing ta look at and remember de routes dey took.
Squee still says Karn's name sometimes when sumpthing surprises him. Just out of habit from calling out ta someone who wuz always dere.
Orim healed Squee seventeen times in one year and didn't say a word about it. Den at de end of de year she said she'd never eat his cooking again. Proportional response.
When Squee yelled 'Squee too' through de speaking tube in de battle he meant it every time. Squee wuz in it every time. Not optional, just real.
Squee has outlived two empires, one god, a bunch of villains, all his friends, and several entirely different types of catastrophe. Still here.
If Squee could talk ta Gerrard one more time he'd say: you were right about most things and I saved your butt enough times ta earn de right ta say dat.
If Squee could talk ta Karn one more time he'd say: Squee love Karn. Like Squee said dat time. Still true.
Squee once counted how many times he saved de Weatherlight crew. He got ta thirty before he lost count and decided de number wuz 'lots' which is more dignified.
Squee's settlement has a rule: every goblin gets treated fair regardless of what dey come from. Squee put dat rule in after remembering de Mogg goblins on Rath.
Squee remembers de Weatherlight's engines had a certain sound when everything wuz working right. A hum. Very reassuring. He still hears it sometimes when he's somewhere warm and safe.
Being immortal means watching people age. Squee watched de whole world age. It's sad in a way dat doesn't ever fully get better. But Squee keeps goin'.
Squee is de living memory of de Weatherlight saga. Dat's a big title. Bigger than Dubious Monarch even. Squee's not sure he deserves it but he's de only one left who can hold it.
Squee once arm-wrestled a Dominarian soldier ta prove a point and won because de soldier wuz too surprised by a goblin challenging him ta focus on winning. Dat counts as strategy.
Squee collected rocks from every place he ever went. Rath rocks. Mercadian rocks. Rocks from de battlefield at Koilos. He lost most of dem but he remembers what dey looked like.
Tahngarth din't want ta do de juggling act, he said, because juggling is beneath a warrior. Squee said it ain't beneath nobody if it's done with commitment. Tahngarth wuz unmoved.
Squee learned ta read a little from spending time near Hanna's charts. Not well. But enough ta recognize a couple words on a map. Important words like 'danger' and 'food.'
Squee sung a Rundvelt goblin song once on de ship at night when he thought nobody wuz listening. Karn wuz listening. He said it sounded nice. Squee never confirmed he wuz singing.
De thing about Gerrard wuz dat even when he wuz wrong he said it with such certainty dat it wuz hard not ta follow him. Squee followed him every time. Never wuz sorry.
Squee once told Gerrard: Squee ain't afraid of nothing. Den he immediately screamed at a shadow. Gerrard never mentioned it. Real class act.
Squee held Hanna's hand once when she wuz real sick and scared and she din't pull away. Squee don't talk about dat much. Too personal.
Squee wuz dere when Gerrard and Hanna had their moments. He wuz always dere. He just made hisself small so dey din't notice. Squee can be quiet when it matters.
Squee once tried ta explain his whole story ta a Mercadian merchant who wuz trying ta sell him sumpthing. De merchant went quiet and walked away. Squee thinks de story got ta dem.
Gerrard called Squee indispensable once and meant it. Squee checked. Gerrard's face had de right expression and everything. One of de best moments of Squee's life.

De Weatherlight had a certain feel when it wuz flying right. You could sense it through your feet. Squee knew when it wuz off and could tell Hanna what wuz wrong before she figured it out. In his own way.
Karn called Squee his friend. Not once as a special occasion. Many times like it wuz just a fact. Squee is Karn's friend. Simple as dat.
When Squee got ta de Stronghold he found a hidin' spot within de first five minutes. Old instinct. You find de hidin' spot first. Den you figure out what ta do.
Volrath's Stronghold smelled like ambition and cruelty. Not literally. But if dose things had a smell dat wuz it.
De Phyrexians din't have names mostly. Just types. Dat made dem harder ta understand. Squee finds it easier ta fight things with names.
Squee's favorite Phyrexian ta shoot wuz de Phyrexian Negator because dey wuz big targets. Easy ta aim at. Satisfying impact.
In de Dreaming Caves dere wuz things dat Squee couldn't describe. He went down dere for Hanna. He'd go again if he had ta. He wouldn't like it.
Mercadia had dis whole market full of merchants and Squee navigated it like he'd lived dere his whole life. Some goblins just have good merchant instincts.
Squee walked inta Crovax's throne room and called him by his first name. De whole court went silent. Crovax almost smiled. Old acquaintances.
De Mogg goblins eventually spread out after Rath got dismantled. Some of dem ended up on Dominaria. Squee helped when he could. Owed dem dat.
Yawgmoth wuz everything wrong with power. He took and took and took and called it perfection. Squee has a very short word for what dat actually wuz.
Squee wuz in de ocean when de Legacy finally worked. He felt it even underwater. Like de whole world exhaled at once.
When Squee became Dubious Monarch he held a little ceremony. He gave a speech. It wuz short and featured de phrase 'try ta be decent ta each other' prominently.
Squee's crown is made from things he found. Bits of metal from de old Weatherlight era. A piece of Kyren gold from Mercadia. Nothing fancy. Squee's kind of crown.
Squee once found a picture of de Weatherlight crew in a history book at a market. De book had de wrong facts about everything. Squee bought it anyway and corrected de margins.
Squee ain't been back ta Rath since de events. He ain't sure Rath is still there, actually. It wuz an artificial place. Artificial places don't always last.
Squee knows what it's like ta be de smallest person in de room and also de most important person in de room at de same time. Dat's a special feeling.
Squee once wuz asked ta give a speech at a goblin gathering. He talked for three hours. Dey gave him a standing ovation. He wuz de only one standin' at dat point.
De Weatherlight wuz a she, not an it. Dat's how Squee thinks of it. He's not sure why. Ships are like dat sometimes.
Squee kept a bit of Karn's silver color in his memory — de way it looked in bright sun, like liquid metal. Very beautiful. Squee told Karn dis once. Karn said thank you.
De moment Squee is most proud of out of everything is dis: Squee went ta de Dreaming Caves for Hanna without being asked twice. He was asked once and went.
Squee understands why Ertai went bad — he wuz ambitious and felt overlooked and Phyrexia offered him power. Squee understands it. He just don't forgive it.
Squee once met a person who claimed ta have been on de Weatherlight. Squee asked dem one question only Squee would know de answer to. Dey din't know it. Squee walked away.
Squee remembers de sound of Tahngarth's laugh, which wuz rare. When it happened it wuz like a clap of thunder in a closed room. Surprisingly wonderful.
Squee remembers de sound of Hanna's voice when she was working on navigation. Very focused, very quiet. Squee tried not ta interrupt dat sound.
Squee remembers Gerrard's voice before big battles — steady, calm, like he already knew how it wuz going to go. Squee din't always believe it. But it helped ta hear it.
Squee remembers Karn's walk — heavy, deliberate, like every step wuz placed on purpose. Squee could tell Karn's walk in de dark from across de ship.
Squee remembers Orim's hands — quick and sure. Never hesitated when somebody needed fixing. Best hands Squee ever saw working.
Squee remembers Sisay's eyes — she looked at everything like she wuz already figuring out de next three moves. Even when she wuz a prisoner. Especially then.
Some folk think goblins can't have wisdom. Squee has several centuries of wisdom now. Very hard-won wisdom dat mostly involves not dying and helping friends.
Squee once told a bard de whole story of de Weatherlight crew and asked dem ta write it down proper. De bard got halfway through and said it wuz 'too much.' Squee told dem dat wuz de point.
De thing about de Phyrexian Invasion dat people get wrong is dey think it wuz one battle. It wuz a thousand battles. Squee wuz in most of dem at some station of de Weatherlight.
Squee wants it known dat he wuz scared every single day on de Weatherlight. Every. Single. Day. And he showed up every single day anyway. Dat's de whole story.
Gerrard once asked Squee why he kept coming back after all de dangerous stuff. Squee said: where else is Squee gonna go? Gerrard had no answer. Dat wuz de answer.
Squee knows de Weatherlight crew saved Dominaria from Yawgmoth. He also knows dat without him specifically at de aft gun, a lot more of dem would've died earlier. Dose two tings can both be true.
De thing about living forever is dat ya eventually become de history. Squee is de history now. He takes dat seriously. Some days more than others.
Squee once stood at de bow of de Weatherlight during a storm and felt perfectly fine about everything for exactly two minutes. Den de storm got worse. But those two minutes wuz real.
Squee's people — de Rundvelt goblins — were always seen as small and cowardly by de big races of Dominaria. Squee is still small. He is no longer cowardly. Well. Less.
Squee once ran across a battlefield at Rath carrying a message dat needed delivering and din't think about it until after. Den he thought about it and needed ta sit down.
Mercadia had dese colorful silks dat fluttered in de market and Squee thought dey were de prettiest things he'd seen since he left Dominaria's forests. He almost bought one.
When Squee navigated de Mercadian streets he remembered every turn he made gettin' lost de day before. Squee's a fast learner when his survival depends on it.
De Stronghold had echoes. Everything sounded twice as bad in dere because of de echoes. Squee's own scared breathing echoed. Not helpful.
Squee din't go ta Ertai's corner of de Stronghold expecting ta finish things. But he'd been waiting for a chance for years without knowing it. When de moment came, he wuz ready.
Phyrexia's thing wuz turning living tings inta machines or making machines seem alive. Squee finds both tings unnatural. He also finds dem very shootable.
Squee once described de Phyrexian Invasion ta a goblin child who asked about de big war. De child fell asleep. Squee wuz somewhat offended. De child woke up and asked for more.
Squee has strong opinions about who deserves credit for what in de story of de Weatherlight. Squee's opinion: Squee deserves more than he got.
Squee's most important quality wuz not his shooting or his sneaking or his immortality. It wuz dat he always showed up. Every time, every battle, every mess. He showed up.
Centuries on and Squee still can't quite believe he wuz dere for all of it. De real Weatherlight. De real Gerrard. De real end of Yawgmoth. Him. Squee from de Rundvelt warrens.
Squee would do it all again. Even de dying parts. Maybe especially de dying parts, because what came after wuz always worth it.
De Legacy said dat Gerrard wuz de hero. Squee ain't arguing. He's just adding a footnote. De footnote says: Squee was dere too. And Squee mattered.
You ask Squee what he is. Squee says: immortal goblin king, retired cannon gunner, former cabin boy, best friend of Karn, and de one who killed Ertai. In dat order.
Squee finished Volrath. Squee bring it up every chance he get. Squee gonna keep bringin' it up forever till someone says thanks proper.
De Weatherlight flew higher dan any ship had a right ta fly and de crew on it wuz de bravest bunch of fools Squee ever met. He's proud ta have been counted among dem.
Squee tucks hisself in at night in his Dubious Monarch bed and thinks: today I helped somebody. Dat's enough. Dat's always been enough.
Squee told his goblins once: we're small but we're fast, we're smart enough, and we keep showing up. Dat's more dan enough ta matter. He believed every word.
De last thing Squee's gonna do someday — if someday ever comes — is tell one more story about de Weatherlight. Den he'll close his eyes. Dat seems right.
Squee ain't gonna pretend he wuzn't terrified every time he stepped off de Weatherlight inta a new danger. But he stepped off anyway. Every. Time.
Gerrard wuz always straighter-backed den Squee. More heroic-looking. But Squee's still here and Gerrard ain't, so maybe upright posture ain't everything.
One time on Rath Squee hid under a floorboard for six hours. Complete darkness. Complete silence. Squee counted his toes ta stay sane. He has ten toes. He counted dem three hundred times.
Squee's first action every time de ship landed somewhere new wuz ta find de nearest food source. Practical. Dat practical thinking kept de whole crew fed more than once.
Karn once asked Squee if he ever got tired of being afraid. Squee said no because bein' afraid means you're payin' attention. Karn thought about dat for a long time.
Squee and Gerrard had an argument once about who wuz more useful. Squee listed seventeen things. Gerrard listed seven. Squee won on volume if nothin' else.
